ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  ADOR WELDING LIMITED has announced July 16, 2026, as the Record Date for its final dividend for FY 2025-26, entitling eligible shareholders to receive Rs. 23 per equity share (230% of face value). This represents a positive material impact for shareholders through a substantial profit distribution. The document is a standard regulatory filing under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations and contains no apparent red flags.
